props.ChoiceText: A chest or cabinet finally yielded to your hands, and afterward you respected metalwork in a more personal way.
props.ChoiceBio: A lock worth learning taught you how much intelligence respectable people trust to brass.

0.TransitionText: Because a lock worth learning taught you how much intelligence respectable people trust to brass, theft, planning, and nerve remained your proper craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Master Thief, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a lock worth learning taught you how much intelligence respectable people trust to brass, grand skill collapsed back into ordinary crime and its constant dangers.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Criminal, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a lock worth learning taught you how much intelligence respectable people trust to brass, stolen value taught you price and opportunity too well to ignore trade.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.
